hausa.use_a_play_note_block: Yi amfani da toshen kunna sauti
hausa.complete_a_challenge_using_fewer_than_: Kammala ƙalubale ta amfani da toshe ƙasa da 5
hausa.use_random_block_in_a_repeat_loop: Yi amfani da toshen bazuwa cikin madaukin maimaitawa
hausa.add_a_move_forward_block_and_run_it: Ƙara toshen «Ci gaba gaba» kuma gudanar da shi.
hausa.drag_a_move_forward_block_to_your_prog: Ja toshen ci gaba gaba zuwa shirinka sannan ka danna gudanarwa!
hausa.draw_a_square_using_move_and_turn_bloc: Zana murabba'i ta amfani da toshen motsi da juyawa.
hausa.you_need_4_move_forward_4_turn_right_9: Kana buƙatar 4× Ci gaba gaba + 4× Juya dama 90°
hausa.draw_the_same_square_using_a_repeat_bl: Zana murabba'i iri ɗaya ta amfani da toshen maimaitawa.
hausa.use_repeat_4_with_move_forward_and_tur: Yi amfani da maimaita 4× tare da ci gaba gaba da juya dama 90° a ciki.
hausa.repeat_3_move_forward_turn_right_120: Maimaita 3×: Ci gaba gaba, Juya dama 120°
hausa.use_set_color_blocks_between_your_move: Yi amfani da toshen saita launi tsakanin toshen ci gaba gaba.
hausa.repeat_5_move_forward_100_turn_right_1: Maimaita 5×: Ci gaba gaba 100, Juya dama 144°
hausa.create_a_spiral_that_grows_outward: Ƙirƙiri karkace da ke girma waje.
hausa.this_is_tricky_try_increasing_the_dist: Wannan yana da wahala! Gwada ƙara nisa kowane lokaci.
hausa.draw_a_perfect_regular_hexagon: Zana hexagon na yau da kullum cikakke.
hausa.repeat_6_move_forward_60_turn_right_60: Maimaita 6×: Ci gaba gaba 60, Juya dama 60°
hausa.create_any_drawing_with_20_line_segmen: Ƙirƙiri kowane zane mai sassan layi 20+.
hausa.combine_everything_you_ve_learned: Haɗa duk abin da ka koya!
hausa.draw_a_house_a_square_base_with_a_tria: Zana gida: tushe murabba'i mai rufin triangle a sama.
hausa.draw_a_square_then_use_pen_up_to_move_: Zana murabba'i, sannan yi amfani da ɗaga alƙalami don motsawa, sannan ka zana triangle don rufi. Yi tunani game da kusurwoyi: murabba'i = 90°, triangle = 120°.
hausa.study_this_finished_square_then_click_: Yi nazarin wannan murabba'i da aka kammala, sannan ka danna gudanarwa don ganin yadda ake zana shi.
hausa.notice_the_pattern_move_turn_repeated_: Lura da tsarin: motsi, juyawa, an maimaita sau huɗu.
hausa.this_loop_should_draw_a_square_but_it_: Wannan madauki ya kamata ya zana murabba'i amma juyawa ya ɓace. Ƙara juya dama 90 cikin maimaitawa.
hausa.add_turn_right_90_after_the_move_forwa: Ƙara juya dama 90 bayan ci gaba gaba, cikin toshen maimaitawa.
hausa.a_finished_triangle_made_with_a_loop_r: Triangle da aka kammala da aka yi da madauki. Gudanar da shi, sannan ka karanta yadda yake aiki.
hausa.repeat_three_times_move_forward_then_t: Maimaita sau uku: ci gaba gaba, sannan juya 120.
hausa.almost_a_hexagon_add_the_missing_turn_: Kusan hexagon. Ƙara juyawar da ya ɓace cikin madauki don rufe shi.
hausa.add_turn_right_60_after_the_move_forwa: Ƙara juya dama 60 bayan ci gaba gaba, cikin toshen maimaitawa.
hausa.a_perfect_regular_hexagon: Hexagon na yau da kullum cikakke
hausa.move_robot_one_cell_forward: Matsar da roboti tantani ɗaya gaba
hausa.if_on_gem: 💎 Idan kana kan dutse mai daraja
hausa.check_if_standing_on_a_gem: Duba ko kana tsaye kan dutse mai daraja
hausa.pick_up_the_gem_at_current_position: Ɗauki dutse mai daraja a wuri na yanzu
hausa.while_not_at_goal: 🏁 Yayin da ba a kai ga manufa ba
hausa.repeat_until_reaching_the_goal: Maimaita har sai ka kai ga manufa
hausa.move_the_robot_forward_3_spaces_to_rea: Matsar da roboti wurare 3 gaba don kaiwa ga manufa!
hausa.navigate_around_the_corner_to_reach_th: Bi kewayen kusurwa don kaiwa ga manufa.
hausa.move_forward_then_turn_then_move_forwa: Ci gaba gaba, sannan juya, sannan ci gaba gaba kuma.
hausa.use_a_repeat_block_to_reach_the_goal_e: Yi amfani da toshen maimaitawa don kaiwa ga manufa cikin inganci.
hausa.use_repeat_4_with_move_forward_inside: Yi amfani da «Maimaita 4» tare da «Ci gaba gaba» a ciki.
hausa.move_through_the_path_and_collect_all_: Bi ta hanya ka tara duwatsu masu daraja 3 duka!
hausa.move_to_each_gem_and_use_collect_gem_o: Je zuwa kowane dutse mai daraja kuma yi amfani da «Tara dutse mai daraja» a kowanne.
hausa.use_if_wall_ahead_to_navigate_a_maze_w: Yi amfani da «Idan akwai bango gaba» don bi ta maze mai juyawa!
hausa.combine_while_not_at_goal_with_if_wall: Haɗa «Yayin da ba a kai ga manufa ba» da «Idan akwai bango gaba» → juya dama, in ba haka ba → ci gaba gaba.
hausa.paint_all_the_unpainted_cells_in_the_r: Zana duk tantanonin da ba a zana ba a layi!
hausa.use_repeat_with_move_forward_and_paint: Yi amfani da maimaitawa tare da «Ci gaba gaba» da «Zana tantani».
hausa.navigate_the_spiral_maze_using_loops_a: Bi ta maze na karkace ta amfani da madauki da yanayi!
hausa.try_while_not_at_goal_if_wall_turn_rig: Gwada «Yayin da ba a kai ga manufa ba»: idan bango → juya dama, in ba haka ba → ci gaba gaba.
hausa.collect_all_gems_and_reach_the_goal_us: Tara duk duwatsu masu daraja ka kai ga manufa! Yi amfani da duk abin da ka koya.
hausa.plan_your_path_carefully_you_may_need_: Tsara hanyarka da kyau. Wataƙila kana buƙatar madauki masu zurfafa!
hausa.add_coding_blocks_from_this_toolbox_to: Ƙara toshen coding daga wannan akwatin kayan aiki don gina shirinka.
hausa.each_block_is_a_command_set_values_wit: Kowane toshe umarni ne. Saita ƙimomi da filayen lambobi. Ja toshe don sake tsarawa!
hausa.click_run_to_watch_your_program_execut: Danna gudanarwa don kallon shirinka yana aiki mataki-mataki akan canvas.
hausa.try_challenges_to_learn_cs_concepts_li: Gwada ƙalubale don koyon ra'ayoyin kimiyyar kwamfuta kamar madauki kuma ka sami XP! 🏆
hausa.switch_to_code_mode_for_javascript_lik: Canza zuwa yanayin lamba don syntax kamar JavaScript. Komai yana ci gaba da daidaitawa!
hausa.welcome_to_the_coding_playground: Barka da zuwa filin wasan coding!
hausa.balanced_bst: Itacen bincike na binary mai daidaito
hausa.sub_millisecond_imperceptible_to_user_: Ƙasa da millisecond ɗaya. Mai amfani ba ya ji. Lafiya ga madauki na ciki masu yawa.
hausa.1_ms_well_within_frame_rate_budget_saf: < 1 millisecond. A cikin kasafin saurin frame cikin sauƙi; lafiya ga masu sarrafa abubuwan UI.
hausa.1ms_1s_will_visibly_lag_ui_needs_progr: 1ms–1s. Zai jinkirta UI a fili; yana buƙatar sandar ci gaba ko matsawa waje da babban thread.
hausa.seconds_to_minutes_batch_job_territory: Daƙiƙa zuwa minti. Yankin aikin batch; mai amfani ya je ɗaukar kofi.
hausa.practically_infinite_at_this_scale_nee: A zahiri mara iyaka a wannan ma'auni. Yana buƙatar algorithm mai kyau ko ƙaramin shigarwa.
hausa.set_input_size_loop_depth_data_structu: Saita girman shigarwa, zurfin madauki, tsarin bayanai da siffar recursion. Hango yadda lambarka za ta yi aiki da sauri (ko sannu) kafin ka gwada ta. Babu maki, babu bayyanawa.
hausa.divide_conquer_n_log_n: Raba ka ci nasara (×n log n)
hausa.your_hypothesis_which_change_buys_the_: Hasashenka (wane canji ke saya saurin mafi girma — ƙaramin n, ƙarancin madauki, ko tsarin bayanai daban?)
hausa.e_g_swapping_array_scan_for_hash_looku: Misali, musanya bincike na array da binciken hash yana rage farashin madaukin waje da factor na n…
hausa.why_does_loop_depth_multiply_rather_th: Me yasa zurfin madauki ke ninka adadin ayyuka maimakon ƙara su?
hausa.when_does_it_matter_that_hash_lookup_i: Yaushe ne yake da muhimmanci cewa binciken hash shine O(1) — a n=10? n=1,000? n=1,000,000?
hausa.exponential_recursion_explodes_after_r: Recursion mai ƙarfafawa yana fashewa kusan bayan kowane n. A ina daidai yake bugun bango?
hausa.for_very_small_n_sometimes_o_n_beats_o: Ga ƙananan n sosai, wani lokaci O(n²) yana doke O(n log n). Me yasa?
hausa.i_can_explain_why_this_combination_of_: Zan iya bayyana dalilin da yasa wannan haɗin n, zurfi, tsarin bayanai da recursion ke ƙarewa anan.
hausa.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Widget na bincike — babu maki, babu bayyanawa, babu maɓallin amsa. Adadin ayyuka kimanta ne na ilimi da na misali waɗanda ke ɗauka ~1 GHz na ingantaccen throughput; aikin gaske ya dogara da cache, hasashen reshe, JIT da masu dindindin gaban kalmar Big-O.
hausa.ai_explains_what_your_code_does: AI yana bayyana abin da lambarka ke yi
hausa.ai_suggests_what_to_try_next: AI yana ba da shawarar abin da za a gwada na gaba
hausa.ai_helps_debug_your_challenge_attempt: AI yana taimakawa gyara ƙoƙarin ƙalubalenka
hausa.export_program_as_json: Fitar da shiri a matsayin JSON
hausa.toggle_drawing_layer_foreground_or_bac: Canza Layer na zane (gaba ko baya)
hausa.turtle_logo_s_drawing_robot_born_1967: Kunkuru — robotin zane na LOGO, an haife shi 1967
hausa.move_forward_turn_pen_down_a_few_primi: Ci gaba gaba, juya, sauke alƙalami: 'yan umarni na asali → fractals, karkace, polygons. Littafin Seymour Papert na Mindstorms (1980) ya nuna cewa yara za su iya gina fahimtar lissafi ta hanyar koya wa kunkuru, ba akasin haka ba.
hausa.robot_navigate_the_grid_collect_solve: Roboti — bi cikin grid, tara, warware
hausa.sequencing_conditionals_loops_function: Tsari → yanayi → madauki → ayyuka, an naɗe cikin maze da za ka iya gani. Yana nuna Karel the Robot (Stanford 1981) da wasannin code.org na zamani. Kurakurai sun zama na sararin: «ya buga bango».
hausa.drag_commands_into_your_program_use_if: 💡 Ja umarni cikin shirinka. Yi amfani da toshen idan/yayin don bi mai wayo!
hausa.click_commands_from_the_toolbox_to_bui: Danna umarni daga akwatin kayan aiki don gina shirinka!
hausa.csta_k_12_iste_ct_sequencing_loops_con: CSTA K-12 • ISTE CT • Tsari, madauki, yanayi, algorithms
hausa.click_blocks_above_or_load_a_template_: Danna toshe a sama ko loda samfuri don farawa
hausa.variable_name_to_change: Sunan mai canzawa da za a canza
hausa.forward_50_right_90_backward_30_repeat:
forward(50)
right(90)
backward(30)

repeat(4, function() {
  forward(100)
  right(90)
})
hausa.commands_forward_n_backward_n_right_de: Umarni: forward(n) backward(n) right(deg) left(deg) penUp() penDown() setColor("#hex") setWidth(n) circle(r) goto(x,y) home() arc(angle,radius) stamp() playNote(freq,dur). Masu canzawa: setVar("name",value) changeVar("name",delta) random("name",min,max) — yi amfani da mai canzawa da $ (kamar forward($name)). Madauki da hankali suna amfani da curly braces: repeat(n){ ... }  while (x < 450){ ... }  if (x > 250){ ... } else { ... }. Ayyuka: function myShape(){ ... } sannan ka kira shi da myShape(). Yanayi suna kwatanta x, y, angle ko $var ta amfani da > < >= <= == != .
